title: 2025 Uskudar University Graduation Ceremony
content:
2025 Uskudar University Graduation Ceremony

2025 Üsküdar University Graduation Ceremony

2025 Üsküdar University Graduation Ceremony

Üsküdar University 12

th

Graduation Ceremony

Once again, Üsküdar University is proud to present its 12

th

graduates with a magnificent ceremony. This year, the 2025 Üsküdar University Graduation Ceremony will take place at the Haliç Congress Center.

Graduates from associate and undergraduate programs for the 2024-2025 Academic Year will receive their diplomas in a grand ceremony at the Haliç Congress Center on July 3 and 4, 2025. At the 2025 Üsküdar University Graduation Ceremony, all of our graduates will toss their caps.

As with every year, the Üsküdar University Graduation Ceremony will be filled with emotional moments and unforgettable memories. After the diploma presentation, Üsküdar graduates will toss their caps and celebrate to the accompaniment of music.

We look forward to seeing you at the 12

th

Üsküdar University Graduation Ceremony, which will take place on Thursday and Friday, July 3 and 4, 2025.

Üsküdar University Graduation Committee
